work_unit: SCRIPTS-L03 fix (audit-2026-07-03-012 derived): autonomous-loop.sh PROMPT single-quote → heredoc
situation: audit-2026-07-03-012 finding SCRIPTS-L03 flagged PROMPT variable in scripts/autonomous-loop.sh defined via single-quoted string literal. Single-quote bash strings are fragile against future edits containing apostrophes (e.g. "don't", "engine's") — any such insertion breaks parsing and stops the autonomous loop from launching.
action: Replaced PROMPT='...' single-quote definition with `read -r -d '' PROMPT <<'PROMPT_EOF' || true` heredoc form. Heredoc preserves no-expansion semantics (single-quoted delimiter) while being content-agnostic to apostrophes. Added explanatory comment referencing SCRIPTS-L03 + audit id. Verified: bash -n syntax check passes; PROMPT loads at runtime with identical 3098-byte content.
outcome_evidence: bash -n scripts/autonomous-loop.sh exits 0; runtime test shows PROMPT variable populated with 3098 bytes matching original content; commit 7ef480a landed on auto/opt-autonomous-studio-shift-1783079845 and pushed to origin; direction-shift triggered automatically by opt-worktree.sh judge_direction_kind (scripts/autonomous-loop.sh listed in .claude/public-interfaces.txt).
next_suggestion: Next round: dispatch SCRIPTS-L04 (distill-patterns.py load_json_robust bare Exception catch, priority 6) — last remaining pending finding from audit-2026-07-03-012. After L04 merged/rejected, all derived fixes closed → set audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete to trigger next full audit.
